attached_docs: KFM GitHub Repository Documentation Implementation Agent v3.1

validation_gates.reason: Verified repository identity and admin permission, default-branch base dc30140567828b45d54426b0e55055ef8d83b5a7, target feature.md stub and blob, issue-intake authority boundary, contribution rules, ADR routing, security posture, CODEOWNERS, receipt schema, and absence of overlapping open work.

Recovered useful historical feature-request concepts covering problem, proposed solution, affected components, dependencies, governance risks, documentation impact, and acceptance criteria while rejecting stale workflow, certification, path, and architecture claims as current evidence.

Parsed front matter with name/about/title/labels/assignees; verified balanced comments and code fences, final newline, ordered section inventory, empty unverified labels, and assignment to verified repository owner bartytime4life.

The template distinguishes feature intake from roadmap commitment, design approval, path reservation, policy, implementation, release, and publication; ADR-triggering proposals route to the governed ADR issue and docs/adr process.

The template captures responsibility roots, lifecycle stages, public interfaces, source/evidence/provenance, rights and sensitivity, safe negative outcomes, compatibility, validation, release/correction/rollback, review duties, and observable acceptance criteria.
Computed SHA-256 6f80fbbe74299600fe32fe1fb017b39746a621a5ae244ce84ff45cb318c793e5 and Git blob SHA db521895f400354cebe4f56cd4866ab3aba12747; GitHub returned the same blob SHA after the update.

The template is not yet on the default branch. Issue chooser rendering, project automation, repository issue settings, prioritization workflow, and required-review enforcement remain NEEDS VERIFICATION after merge.

notes: AI-authored replacement of the public feature issue-template stub on a scoped review branch. The artifact structures proposal intake and triage only. It does not create a roadmap commitment, accept an architecture decision, reserve a path, decide policy, authorize implementation, approve release or publication, or prove the feature exists. Historical feature-form material was used only to recover useful requirements, not as current implementation proof. Human review remains pending.
